segments.text: Then Bildad the Shuhite answered,
How long will you speak these things? Shall the words of your mouth be a mighty wind?
segments.speaker: Bildad

segments.text: Does God pervert justice? Or does the Almighty pervert righteousness?
segments.speaker: Bildad

segments.text: If your children have sinned against him, he has delivered them into the hand of their disobedience.
segments.speaker: Bildad

segments.text: If you want to seek God diligently, make your supplication to the Almighty.
segments.speaker: Bildad

segments.text: If you were pure and upright, surely now he would awaken for you, and make the habitation of your righteousness prosperous.
segments.speaker: Bildad

segments.text: Though your beginning was small, yet your latter end would greatly increase.
segments.speaker: Bildad

segments.text: “Please inquire of past generations. Find out about the learning of their fathers.
segments.speaker: Bildad

segments.text: (For we are but of yesterday, and know nothing, because our days on earth are a shadow.)
segments.speaker: Bildad

segments.text: Shall they not teach you, tell you, and utter words out of their heart?
segments.speaker: Bildad

segments.text: “Can the papyrus grow up without mire? Can the rushes grow without water?
segments.speaker: Bildad

segments.text: While it is yet in its greenness, not cut down, it withers before any other reed.
segments.speaker: Bildad

segments.text: So are the paths of all who forget God. The hope of the godless man will perish,
segments.speaker: Bildad

segments.text: whose confidence will break apart, whose trust is a spider’s web.
segments.speaker: Bildad

segments.text: He will lean on his house, but it will not st and. He will cling to it, but it will not endure.
segments.speaker: Bildad

segments.text: He is green before the sun. His shoots go out along his garden.
segments.speaker: Bildad

segments.text: His roots are wrapped around the rock pile. He sees the place of stones.
segments.speaker: Bildad

segments.text: If he is destroyed from his place, then it will deny him, saying, ‘I have not seen you.’
segments.speaker: Bildad

segments.text: Behold, this is the joy of his way. Out of the earth, others will spring.
segments.speaker: Bildad

segments.text: “Behold, God will not cast away a blameless man, neither will he uphold the evildoers.
segments.speaker: Bildad

segments.text: He will still fill your mouth with laughter, your lips with shouting.
segments.speaker: Bildad

segments.text: Those who hate you will be clothed with shame. The tent of the wicked will be no more.
segments.speaker: Bildad
